title: hieracium levicaule subsp. flaccidum
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. flaccidum, also known as Hieracium flaccidum, is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a perennial herb with yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, Hieracium levicaule subsp. flaccidum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is said to be used to treat various conditions, including arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems.
